meta.title: Scan Candidates
meta.desc: BEACON output: entities with PreGraphTA scores from the latest scan cycle. Promoted candidates (≥ 0.35) advance to WEAVER for graph analysis.

sqlite.query: SELECT entity, org_id, plane, ROUND(pre_graph_ta, 2) as pre_graph_ta, ROUND(t_score, 2) as t_score, ROUND(a_score, 2) as a_score, details FROM scan_candidates WHERE promoted = 1 ORDER BY pre_graph_ta DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(promoted) as promoted, COUNT(DISTINCT plane) as planes_hit, COUNT(DISTINCT org_id) as orgs_affected, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN promoted=1 THEN pre_graph_ta END), 2) as avg_promoted_score FROM scan_candidates WHERE run_date = (SELECT MAX(run_date) FROM scan_candidates)

compute.expr: '**' & $string(fetched_sources.stats[0].total) & '** candidates scanned  |  **' & $string(fetched_sources.stats[0].promoted) & '** promoted (≥ 0.35)  |  **' & $string(fetched_sources.stats[0].planes_hit) & '** planes  |  **' & $string(fetched_sources.stats[0].orgs_affected) & '** orgs  |  Avg promoted score: **' & $string(fetched_sources.stats[0].avg_promoted_score) & '**'
